ambiguities.requirement: The system shall keep the card if it is invalid, expired, or the PIN was entered incorrectly too many times.

potential_missing.source_sentence: After the user finishes interacting with the ATM—whether they completed a transaction, cancelled it, or something went wrong—the machine begins to wrap things up.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall keep the card if it is invalid, expired, or the PIN was entered incorrectly too many times.
The system shall return the card with a message if the user cancels the operation or the request is rejected.
The system shall print a receipt and dispense cash if needed before returning the card to the user after a successful transaction.
The system shall consider the session finished once the card is ejected.
The system shall move into a short ending phase before resetting itself after completing the transaction or cancellation process.
The system shall return to its normal waiting condition or shut down depending on the situation.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the card is invalid, expired, or the PIN was entered incorrectly too many times, the ATM keeps the card and informs the user.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall keep the card if it is invalid, expired, or the PIN was entered incorrectly too many times and inform the user.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user cancels the operation or the request is rejected, the machine simply returns the card with a message.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall return the card with a message if the user cancels the operation or the request is rejected.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the transaction is successful, the ATM may first print a receipt and, if needed, dispense cash. After completing these actions, it returns the card to the user.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall print a receipt and dispense cash if needed before returning the card to the user after a successful transaction.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the card is ejected, the system considers the session finished. It then moves into a short ending phase before resetting itself.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall consider the session finished once the card is ejected and move into a short ending phase before resetting itself.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Finally, depending on the situation, the ATM either goes back to its normal waiting condition or shuts down if required.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall return to its normal waiting condition or shut down depending on the situation.
